creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

I had to make a few little modifications.

The windowmaker port also has a a slave port, x11-wm/libwraster. This 
patch also resets PORTREVISION on that. Apart from that it's the ame as 
your patch.

Can you approve this?

Thanks.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
